Spoke with Gabe to address a recent spike in customer declines and provide coaching on common decline reasons. Offered to personally review declined applications to potentially save deals, and clarified tax procedures for lease transactions.

Meeting Notes:

Customer Trends & Competitor Intel: The shop has experienced an extreme amount of declines over the past few months. Gabe primarily uses American First, but noted their approval rates aren't much better right now.

Coaching Provided: Reviewed common decline reasons with Gabe, including typos, bad credit, poor bank account management, and the use of meta banks. Highlighted that we are currently seeing a large number of credit freezes and typos system-wide as potential factors.

Action Taken: Offered to manually review his recently declined customers to determine the exact reasons and see if any of those deals can potentially be saved.

Compliance Reminder: Reminded Gabe that he cannot charge taxes d...

Subject: 00UTO00000YPuMn2AL
_label_Company / Account: J6 Properties, LLC DBA Christian Brothers Spring Stuebner
Full Comments:
Checked in via Maps Application 
Met with Robert to review March performance, discuss their active pipeline, and set incentive goals for the new month. We remain their first choice for financing, and overall shop traffic continues to be steady.

Meeting Notes:

Performance Review: Discussed March numbers; the shop came in just under $3k short of their goal, but the high number of submitted applications demonstrated strong effort.

Active Pipeline: Robert currently has 2 customers with pending jobs that he is waiting to finish and finalize.

Incentives: Offered to work on securing another shop lunch (similar to what we did in February) if they can get off to a fast start this month.

Competitor Intel & Positioning: We are still their first choice, though we occasionally lose some business to Affirm when customers automatically opt into it.

Business Trends: Car count at the shop has been very steady.

Next Steps: Made Robert aware that Noemy will be reaching out to him soon.
_label_Full Comments:
